adaptability: Powers up moves that are super effective on the Pokémon.
aerilate: Normal-type moves become Flying-type and gain 20% more power.
aftermath: Deals damage to the Pokémon that knocked this Pokémon out upon contact.
air-lock: Cancels out effects of weather conditions when the Pokémon is in battle.
analytic: Powers up moves that are used after the Pokémon's opponent.
anger-point: Sharply raises the Pokémon's Attack stat if hit by a critical hit.
anger-shell: Raises the Pokémon's Speed and Special stats when hit while its HP is low.
anticipation: Senses an opposing Pokémon's dangerous move and alerts the trainer.
arena-trap: Prevents opposing Pokémon from fleeing or switching out.
armor-tail: This Pokémon's Tail protects it and its allies from multi-turn moves.
aroma-veil: Protects the Pokémon and its allies from stat-lowering moves.
as-one-spectrier: Combines the effects of Shadow Tag and Speed Boost.
aura-break: Reverses the effects of all Aura abilities on the field.
ball-fetch: The Pokémon can fetch a Poké Ball used in the last turn.
battery: Raises the Special Attack stat of the Pokémon's allies.
battle-armor: Prevents the Pokémon from receiving critical hits.
battle-bond: Forms a strong bond with a trainer when KO'd by this Pokémon, and gets stronger.
beads-of-ruin: Reduces the Special Defense stat of all Pokémon except Dark-types.
beast-boost: The Pokémon's highest stat is raised by one stage after it KOs a Pokémon.
berserk: Raises the Pokémon's Special Attack stat when it takes damage.
big-pecks: Prevents the Pokémon's Defense stat from being lowered.
blaze: Powers up Fire-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.
bulletproof: Protects the Pokémon from ball and bomb moves.
cheek-pouch: Restores HP when the Pokémon eats any berry.
chilling-neigh: Raises the Pokémon's Attack stat when a Pokémon faints.
chlorophyll: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in harsh sunlight.
clear-body: Prevents the Pokémon's stats from being lowered by an opponent.
cloud-nine: Cancels out effects of weather conditions in battle.
color-change: Changes the Pokémon's type to match the move it's hit by.
comatose: The Pokémon is always in a sleep-like state.
commander: The Pokémon commands Pawniard to fight as its ally.
competitive: Sharply raises the Pokémon's Special Attack stat when its stats are lowered.
compound-eyes: Raises the accuracy of the Pokémon's moves.
contrary: Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokémon.
corrosion: Poisons opposing Pokémon, including those with Steel-type or Poison-type.
costar: The Pokémon copies the stat changes of the Pokémon it replaces.
cotton-down: Lowers the Speed stat of opposing Pokémon when this Pokémon takes damage.
cud-chew: The Pokémon can chew up and use items again.
curious-medicine: Resets the stat changes of nearby Pokémon when this Pokémon enters battle.
cursed-body: May disable a move used on this Pokémon.
cute-charm: May infatuate opposing Pokémon that hit this Pokémon.
damp: Prevents opposing Pokémon from using self-destructing moves.
dancer: Copies the stat-raising effects of the Pokémon's opponent's moves.
dark-aura: Powers up Dark-type moves for all Pokémon in battle.
dauntless-shield: Raises the Pokémon's Defense stat when it enters battle.
dazzling: Prevents opposing Pokémon from using priority moves.
defeatist: Weakens the Pokémon's moves when its HP is low.
defiant: Sharply raises the Pokémon's Attack stat when its stats are lowered.
delta-stream: Eliminates the weaknesses of Flying-type Pokémon in a strong wind.
desolate-land: Turns the weather into harsh sunlight to boost Fire-type moves.
disguise: Disguises the Pokémon's appearance until it takes damage.
download: Compares the opponent's Defense and Special Defense stats and raises Pokémon's Attack or Special Attack accordingly.
drizzle: Summons rain when the Pokémon enters battle.
drought: Summons harsh sunlight when the Pokémon enters battle.
dry-skin: Reduces damage from Fire-type moves and restores HP in rain.
early-bird: Awakens the Pokémon faster from sleep.
earth-eater: Restores HP when hit by an Ground-type move.
effect-spore: May infect a Pokémon that hits this Pokémon with a status condition.
electric-surge: Boosts Electric-type moves by creating electric terrain.
electromorphosis: Charges the Pokémon with electricity when it's hit by a move.
emergency-exit: Switches the Pokémon out when its HP becomes low.
fairy-aura: Powers up Fairy-type moves for all Pokémon in battle.
filter: Reduces damage taken from super-effective moves.
flame-body: May burn a Pokémon that hits this Pokémon with a contact move.
flare-boost: Raises the Pokémon's Special Attack stat if it's burned.
flash-fire: Absorbs Fire-type moves and boosts the Pokémon's Fire-type moves.
flower-gift: Raises the Pokémon and its ally's Attack and Special Defense stats in harsh sunlight.
flower-veil: Prevents lowering of Defense stat for Grass-type Pokémon on the field.
fluffy: Reduces damage taken from contact moves and Fire-type moves.
forecast: Changes the Pokémon's type based on the weather.
forewarn: Reveals the opponent's held item or strongest move.
friend-guard: Reduces damage taken by the Pokémon's allies.
frisk: Reveals an opponent's held item when the Pokémon enters battle.
full-metal-body: Prevents the Pokémon's stats from being lowered by opposing moves or abilities.
gale-wings: Gives priority to Flying-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is full.
galvanize: Normal-type moves become Electric-type and gain 20% more power.
gluttony: Makes the Pokémon eat a held Berry when its HP drops to one-half or less.
good-as-gold: Blocks the effects of moves and abilities used by opposing Pokémon.
gooey: Lowers the Speed stat of a Pokémon that hits this Pokémon with a contact move.
gorilla-tactics: Boosts the power of moves selected first each turn by 50%.
grass-pelt: Boosts the Pokémon's Defense stat when Grassy Terrain is active.
grassy-surge: Boosts Grass-type moves by creating grassy terrain.
grim-neigh: Raises the Pokémon's Special Attack stat when a Pokémon faints.
guard-dog: Boosts Attack stat when hit by intimidating moves and prevents switching.
gulp-missile: Stores a Pokémon it gulped, then spits it back out if hit.
guts: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat if it has a status condition.
hadron-engine: Powers up Electric-type moves and sets terrain.
harvest: Restores a held Berry if consumed in a previous turn.
healer: May cure the status condition of an ally with each turn.
heatproof: Reduces damage taken from Fire-type moves.
hospitality: Heals the Pokémon's allies when it enters battle.
hunger-switch: Switches between hungry and full forms.
hustle: Boosts Attack but lowers accuracy of physical moves.
hydration: Heals the Pokémon's status condition if it's raining.
hyper-cutter: Prevents the Pokémon's Attack stat from being lowered.
ice-face: The Pokémon's appearance changes to conceal its true form in hail.
ice-scales: Reduces damage from special moves when the Pokémon is frozen.
illuminate: Raises the accuracy of its own moves.
illusion: Disguises the Pokémon as the last Pokémon in the party.
immunity: Prevents the Pokémon from being poisoned.
imposter: Transforms into the Pokémon it's facing.
infiltrator: Passes through the protective effects of the opponent's moves and abilities.
innards-out: Damages the Pokémon that KOs this Pokémon by the same amount of HP it lost.
inner-focus: Prevents the Pokémon from being flinched.
insomnia: Prevents the Pokémon from being put to sleep.
intimidate: Lowers the Attack stat of opposing Pokémon when the Pokémon enters battle.
intrepid-sword: Raises the Pokémon's Attack stat when it enters battle.
iron-barbs: Damages a Pokémon that hits this Pokémon with a contact move.
iron-fist: Boosts the power of punching moves.
justified: Raises the Pokémon's Attack stat when hit by a Dark-type move.
keen-eye: Prevents the Pokémon's accuracy from being lowered.
klutz: The Pokémon can't use held items.
leaf-guard: Prevents the Pokémon from being affected by status conditions in harsh sunlight.
libero: Changes the Pokémon's type to the type of the move it's about to use.
lightning-rod: Draws in Electric-type moves and raises Special Attack.
limber: Prevents the Pokémon from being paralyzed.
lingering-aroma: Spreads a calming aroma that prevents the Pokémon from being infatuated.
liquid-ooze: Damages a Pokémon that tries to drain HP from this Pokémon.
liquid-voice: Powers up sound-based moves and makes them Water-type.
long-reach: The Pokémon strikes without making contact.
magic-bounce: Reflects stat-lowering moves back to the Pokémon that used them.
magic-guard: Protects the Pokémon from damage not caused by direct attacks.
magician: Steals a Pokémon's held item when hitting it with a move.
magma-armor: Prevents the Pokémon from being frozen.
marvel-scale: Raises the Pokémon's Defense stat if it has a status condition.
mega-launcher: Boosts the power of aura and pulse moves.
merciless: Makes moves used on frozen Pokémon always critical hits.
mimicry: Changes the Pokémon's type based on the terrain.
minds-eye: Ignores changes to accuracy and evasion; always hits.
minus: Raises the Pokémon's Special Attack if an ally has Plus.
mirror-armor: Reflects stat-lowering moves back to the Pokémon that used them.
misty-surge: Boosts Fairy-type moves by creating misty terrain.
mold-breaker: Ignores the effects of Pokémon abilities in battle.
moody: Raises one stat and lowers another stat every turn.
motor-drive: Raises the Pokémon's Speed stat when hit by an Electric-type move.
moxie: Raises the Pokémon's Attack stat when it KOs a Pokémon.
multiscale: Reduces damage to the Pokémon if its HP is full.
multitype: Changes the Pokémon's type based on its held item.
mummy: Replaces an opponent's ability with Mummy when hit by a contact move.
mycelium-might: Protects the Pokémon's move from being blocked and always acts last.
natural-cure: Heals the Pokémon's status condition when it switches out.
neutralizing-gas: Cancels out the abilities of all Pokémon in battle.
no-guard: Ensures all moves used by or against this Pokémon will never miss.
normalize: Changes all moves used by the Pokémon to Normal-type.
oblivious: Prevents the Pokémon from being infatuated.
opportunist: Copies the stat increases of the Pokémon's opponents.
orichalcum-pulse: Powers up Dragon-type moves with ancient power.
overcoat: Protects the Pokémon from damage from weather and powder moves.
overgrow: Powers up Grass-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.
own-tempo: Prevents the Pokémon from becoming confused.
parental-bond: Allows the Pokémon to strike twice with one move.
pastel-veil: Prevents the Pokémon and its allies from being poisoned.
perish-body: Damages the Pokémon that hit this Pokémon and triggers Perish Song.
pickpocket: Steals an opponent's held item when hit by a contact move.
pickup: May pick up items used by an opponent.
pixilate: Normal-type moves become Fairy-type and gain 20% more power.
plus: Raises the Pokémon's Special Attack if an ally has Minus.
poison-heal: Restores HP if the Pokémon is poisoned instead of taking damage.
poison-point: May poison a Pokémon that hits this Pokémon with a contact move.
poison-puppeteer: Takes control of a poisoned opponent.
poison-touch: May poison a Pokémon that hits this Pokémon with a contact move.
power-construct: Increases the Pokémon's stats and creates a new form.
power-of-alchemy: Copies the ability of the Pokémon that last fainted.
power-spot: Raises the Special Attack stat of the Pokémon and its allies.
prankster: Gives priority to the Pokémon's status moves.
pressure: Increases the PP cost of moves used against the Pokémon.
primordial-sea: Turns the weather into heavy rain to boost Water-type moves.
prism-armor: Reduces damage taken from super-effective moves.
propeller-tail: Ignores the effects of the opponent's moves and abilities.
protean: Changes the Pokémon's type to the type of the move it's about to use.
protosynthesis: Powers up Pokémon and raises a stat based on its highest.
psychic-surge: Boosts Psychic-type moves by creating psychic terrain.
punk-rock: Boosts sound-based moves and blocks them from affecting this Pokémon.
purifying-salt: Prevents stat changes and status conditions from opposing moves.
quark-drive: Powers up Electric-type moves and raises a stat based on the terrain.
queenly-majesty: Prevents opposing Pokémon from using priority moves.
quick-draw: Gives the Pokémon a 30% chance to move before other Pokémon.
quick-feet: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat if it has a status condition.
rattled: Raises the Pokémon's Speed stat when hit by a Dark, Ghost, or Bug-type move.
receiver: Copies the ability of an ally that faints.
reckless: Boosts moves that cause recoil damage.
refrigerate: Normal-type moves become Ice-type and gain 20% more power.
regenerator: Restores a percentage of the Pokémon's maximum HP when it switches out.
ripen: Ripens Berries and doubles their effects.
rivalry: Boosts Attack when the opponent is the same gender.
rks-system: Changes the Pokémon's type based on its held item.
rough-skin: Damages a Pokémon that hits this Pokémon with a contact move.
run-away: Ensures the Pokémon can always escape from wild Pokémon.
sand-force: Boosts Ground, Rock, and Steel-type moves in sandstorm.
sand-rush: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in sandstorm.
sand-spit: Creates sandstorm when the Pokémon is hit by a move.
sand-stream: Summons sandstorm when the Pokémon enters battle.
sap-sipper: Restores HP when hit by a Grass-type move.
schooling: Transforms into a different form when the Pokémon's HP is above 25%.
scrappy: Allows normal and fighting moves to hit ghost-type Pokémon.
screen-cleaner: Removes the effects of moves that create barriers when this Pokémon enters.
seed-sower: Creates grassy terrain when the Pokémon is hit by a move.
serene-grace: Doubles the likelihood of a move having a secondary effect.
shadow-shield: Reduces damage taken if the Pokémon's HP is full.
shadow-tag: Prevents opposing Pokémon from switching out.
sharpness: Enhances the power of slicing moves.
shed-skin: The Pokémon may heal its own status condition.
sheer-force: Powers up moves with secondary effects by 30% but prevents those effects.
shell-armor: Prevents the Pokémon from receiving critical hits.
shield-dust: Prevents the secondary effects of moves used against the Pokémon.
simple: Doubles the effects of stat changes affecting the Pokémon.
skill-link: Increases the number of hits of moves that strike multiple times.
slow-start: Requires 5 turns for the Pokémon's stats to take effect.
slush-rush: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in hail.
sniper: Increases the damage of critical hits.
snow-warning: Summons hail when the Pokémon enters battle.
solar-power: Boosts the Pokémon's Special Attack stat in harsh sunlight.
solid-rock: Reduces damage taken from super-effective moves.
soul-heart: Raises the Pokémon's Special Attack stat whenever a Pokémon faints.
soundproof: Prevents the Pokémon from being affected by sound-based moves.
speed-boost: Raises the Pokémon's Speed stat by one stage every turn.
stakeout: Doubles the damage dealt to Pokémon that just switched in.
stall: Gives the Pokémon a lower priority.
stalwart: Ignores the effects of the opponent's moves and abilities.
stamina: Raises the Pokémon's Defense stat when hit by a move.
stance-change: Changes the Pokémon's form depending on how it fights.
static: May paralyze a Pokémon that hits this Pokémon with a contact move.
steadfast: Prevents the Pokémon from being flinched.
steam-engine: Raises the Pokémon's Speed stat when hit by Fire or Water-type moves.
steelworker: Boosts the power of Steel-type moves.
steely-spirit: Boosts the power of Steel-type moves for this Pokémon and its allies.
stench: Reduces the chance of encountering wild Pokémon due to a foul smell.
sticky-hold: Prevents the Pokémon's held item from being stolen.
storm-drain: Draws in Water-type moves and raises Special Attack.
strong-jaw: Boosts the power of jaw-based moves.
sturdy: Prevents the Pokémon from being knocked out by one-hit KO moves.
suction-cups: Prevents the Pokémon from being switched out by opponent's moves.
super-luck: Raises the likelihood of landing a critical hit.
supersweet-syrup: Lowers the Pokémon's evasion and that of its allies.
supreme-overlord: Boosts the Pokémon's stats based on fainted allies.
surge-surfer: Doubles the Pokémon's Speed stat when electric terrain is active.
swarm: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.
sweet-veil: Prevents the Pokémon and its allies from being put to sleep.
swift-swim: Doubles the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.
sword-of-ruin: Reduces the Defense stat of all Pokémon except Dark-types.
symbiosis: Transfers the Pokémon's held item to an ally if the ally's item is used.
synchronize: Copies any stat changes or status conditions affecting the Pokémon to the opponent.
tablets-of-ruin: Reduces the Special Attack stat of all Pokémon except Dark-types.
tangled-feet: Increases the Pokémon's evasion if it's confused.
tangling-hair: Lowers the Speed stat of a Pokémon that hits this Pokémon with a contact move.
technician: Boosts the power of low-power moves.
telepathy: Prevents the Pokémon from being hit by its allies' moves.
tera-shell: Reduces damage taken when the Pokémon's HP is full.
tera-shift: Changes the Pokémon's type when it enters battle.
teraform-zero: Changes weather and terrain effects when this Pokémon enters battle.
teravolt: Ignores the effects of Pokémon abilities when using moves.
thermal-exchange: Raises the Pokémon's Attack stat if it's burned.
thick-fat: Reduces damage taken from Fire and Ice-type moves.
tinted-lens: Boosts the power of moves that are not very effective.
torrent: Powers up Water-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.
tough-claws: Boosts the power of contact moves.
toxic-boost: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat if it's poisoned.
toxic-chain: Poisons Pokémon hit by this Pokémon's moves.
toxic-debris: Scatters poisonous spikes when this Pokémon is hit by a contact move.
trace: Copies the ability of the Pokémon it's facing.
transistor: Boosts the power of Electric-type moves.
triage: Gives priority to moves that restore HP.
truant: The Pokémon can't use a move if it is the last Pokémon to use one.
turboblaze: Ignores the effects of Pokémon abilities when using moves.
unaware: Ignores stat changes and uses unmodified stats.
unburden: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat if its held item is used or lost.
unnerve: Makes opposing Pokémon unable to eat held Berries.
unseen-fist: This Pokémon's moves can hit Ghost-type Pokémon and bypass protection.
vessel-of-ruin: Reduces the Special Defense stat of all Pokémon except Water-types.
victory-star: Raises the accuracy of the Pokémon and its allies.
vital-spirit: Prevents the Pokémon from being put to sleep.
volt-absorb: Restores HP if hit by an Electric-type move.

water-compaction: Raises the Pokémon's Defense stat when hit by a Water-type move.
water-veil: Prevents the Pokémon from being burned.
weak-armor: Lowers Defense and raises Speed when hit by a physical move.
well-baked-body: The Pokémon becomes Fire-type when hit by a Fire-type move.
